name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, delayed reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate progress reporting instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to generate timely and accurate progress reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to generate timely and accurate progress reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, delayed reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate progress reporting instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
